title: «The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess» is coming to 3DS!
summary: The developer Game of Tobi is currently developing it.
content: Following the decompilation of the Wii game "The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess", developer Game of Tobi is currently developing a native port for the Nintendo 3DS. The project aims to bring the iconic adventure game to Nintendo's handheld console, and the developer has stated that the 3DS has the capabilities to run it.

title: Local multiplayer is coming to Azahar
summary: Local multiplayer is finally coming to the Azahar emulator
content: Available in version 2126.0, local multiplayer finally arrives on the Azahar emulator. However, be aware of one important distinction: this function does not allow for a direct local connection between two nearby Android devices, as the 3DS did via its dedicated wireless chip, you must be connected to the same Wi-Fi network.
